title: The Glow That Starts Beneath the Surface
excerpt: Forget the shelf full of creams. If you’ve been chasing that lit-from-within glow, it might be time to look a little deeper. At Carisma...
body_text:
Forget the shelf full of creams. If you’ve been chasing that lit-from-within glow, it might be time to look a little deeper.

At Carisma Aesthetics, we believe your skin deserves more than surface-level care. That’s why we’re shining the spotlight on Profhilo—the skin booster that hydrates from within and brings out your most radiant self.
[Image: Profhilo Treatment]

Why Skincare Can Only Go So Far
Moisturisers and serums are great. They help lock in moisture and smooth your skin. But here’s the truth: they don’t reach the deeper layers where real change begins.
That’s where skin boosters step in. They work below the surface to improve texture, tone, and firmness—without changing your features. Just healthier, glowier skin.

What Is Profhilo, Really?
Profhilo is an injectable made from pure hyaluronic acid—a substance your body already makes. Tiny amounts are placed just under the skin, in the areas that need the most love: face, neck, or hands.
It helps your skin:
Stay deeply hydrated

Produce more collagen and elastin

Feel firmer and more elastic

Look smoother, fresher, and naturally lifted

All with no harsh chemicals and no fake volume—just your own skin doing what it does best.

Why People Love It
Think of Profhilo as quiet luxury. It doesn’t scream for attention—it just makes your skin look naturally better.
It’s a favourite for a reason:
Two types of hyaluronic acid for deep, even hydration

Quick treatment with no downtime

Subtle, elegant results over time

Works for all ages and skin types


Whether you’re prepping for an event, feeling dull after winter, or just ready for a refresh—Profhilo fits beautifully into your skin routine.

What to Expect
Here’s how easy it is:
Treatment: 10 small injections in key areas

Time: About 30 minutes total

Results: Some glow within days, best after 2 sessions

Downtime: Tiny bumps that disappear in a day or two

It’s sometimes called the “lunchtime injectable”—because it’s that simple.

Why Now Is the Perfect Time
Summer is here. That means more sun, more heat, and more bare skin.

Profhilo helps your skin:
Stay plump and bouncy, even in dry heat

Look fresh and radiant without makeup

Shine naturally in photos and bright light

It’s also a favourite for brides-to-be, grads, and anyone wanting to feel confident in summer skin.

What Our Clients Say
“It feels like my skin is drinking water—constantly.”
 “I stopped wearing makeup. My skin looked that good.”
“People kept asking what I’d done. But they couldn’t tell. That’s exactly what I wanted.”

Glow Deeper: Spa Pairings We Love
Want even more glow? Pair your Profhilo treatment with a hydrating facial or a hammam ritual at Carisma Spa. It’s the ultimate way to relax, reset, and amplify your results.

Glow tip: Lymphatic massage helps support circulation and gives your skin that fresh, post-treatment radiance.

Ready to Try the Skin Treatment Everyone’s Talking About?
Moisturisers are great—but Profhilo goes where they can’t.
Book your consultation at Carisma Aesthetics and experience the difference for yourself. Subtle. Natural. Lasting.

Because true confidence glows from within.
